Blocker: Single tender only — no multiple tenders permitted
Why_it_matters: Submitting more than one bid results in automatic disqualification
Evidence: Multiple Tenders: Ei sallittu [Not permitted] — TED BT-769
Action: Confirm your organisation will submit exactly one offer

Why_it_matters: Any alternative technical solution submitted alongside the main bid will be rejected
Evidence: Variants: Ei sallittu [Not permitted] — TED BT-63
Action: Ensure bid contains no alternative proposals

Why_it_matters: Deadline was 23 April 2026 at 12:00 (UTC+03:00); today is 28 April 2026
Action: Confirm whether a corrigendum or extended deadline has been issued in Cloudia; if not, this tender is closed

Blocker: Supplier suitability / qualification criteria not met
Why_it_matters: Eligibility requires meeting unspecified suitability criteria; non-compliant bids are excluded before price comparison
Evidence: Selection criteria are indicated in the procurement documents — TED BT-821
Action: Retrieve and review full qualification criteria from the procurement documents on Cloudia

Why_it_matters: Mandatory exclusion grounds apply; failure to satisfy them results in rejection regardless of price
Evidence: Exclusion Grounds are indicated in the procurement documents — TED BT-806
Action: Verify your organisation has no grounds for exclusion (e.g. tax arrears, criminal convictions, misrepresentation)

Why_it_matters: Inability to issue e-invoices in the required Finnish standard would constitute non-compliance
Action: Confirm your finance system can issue compliant Finnish e-invoices (Finvoice or PEPPOL)

Why_it_matters: Failure to provide the required bond makes the contract non-executable; inability to arrange it is a practical blocker
Evidence: Rakennusajan vakuus on 10 % arvonlisäverottomasta urakkahinnasta (YSE 36 §) — TED BT-75
Action: Confirm your organisation can obtain a surety bond at 10% of the contract value (est. ~€90,000 excl. VAT)

Why_it_matters: Work on Solistinkatu northern section and Rata-aukio 2 may be legally prohibited or delayed; contract scope could shrink after award
Evidence: Hallinto-oikeudella on mahdollisuus kieltää kadunpidon aloittaminen… Rakennusluvan käsittely on parhaillaan käynnissä — TED BT-300
Action: Assess whether your pricing and programme can accommodate a reduced or delayed scope without commercial harm
